ANNIE S. AMARAL, ESQ., DOWNEY BRAND LLP 916.444.1000 aamaral@downeybrand.com Attorney for Defendants SBM MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LP; SBM FACILITY SERVICES, LLC; CONWY, LLC; CHARLES SOMERS LIVING TRUST for Defendant.

Christina Bicocca CSR#12932 916-696-7441 christianacsr@gmail.com Court reporter

Hearing is held. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT SBM FACILITY SERVICES, LLC, CONWY, LLC, CHARLES SOMERS LIVING TRUST, SBM MANAGEMENT SERVICES, LP Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Arbitration is taken under submission.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order repeating verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling by email to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Christina Bicocca CSR#12932 916-696-7441 christianacsr@gmail.com , Reported. (302/RBU)
